name_en: 💖《With full original green box packaging》💖 GG Marmont Series Card Holder, Gucci continues to update colors, adding more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont series with a modern perspective. This card holder is crafted from Forest Green leather, with brand identity accessories presented in palladium tone. Forest Green leather, palladium-tone hardware, double-G, 4 card slots.
name_cn:
💖《With full original green box packaging》💖 GG Marmont Series Card Holder, Gucci continues to update colors, adding more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont series with a modern perspective. This card holder is crafted from Forest Green leather, with brand identity accessories presented in palladium tone. Forest Green leather, palladium-tone hardware, double-G, 4 card slots.
Model: 657588.
Dimensions: 11cm(W) x 7cm(H)
Color: Green/Full Leather.
Made in Italy
